name: Oatmeal Granola Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the brown sugar, margarine, and baking soda over medium heat until well blended.
2. Gradually add the cooked oatmeal to the mixture and stir until combined.
3. Transfer the mixture to an 8-inch square greased pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
5. Allow bars to cool completely in the pan before cutting into serving portions.
